topic: noise envelope module implementation push to limits — tool/noise_envelope_bench.hexa actual implementation per G5 spec + tool/noise_envelope_parity_lint.hexa actual implementation per B1.fix_path spec + chi-square + collision rate measurement on accumulated state/kick/runs noise_envelopes.jsonl corpus. Both tools created (bench=647 lines, parity_lint=348 lines), both selftests PASS, real corpus run shows γ chi^2=10.262 vs critical 25.00 (NOT rejected), β coverage 42.58% vs expected 42.86% (in ±5pp band), 1 collision (input_equivalent only, 0 true hash collisions), parity_lint 4/4 MATCH on canonical noise_envelope.hexa vs mirror kick_dispatch.hexa.

gamma.payload_summary: bridge_pick=bridge_simbad invocation=tool/simbad_bridge.hexa (real fetch deferred to sub-agent or OFFLINE-FALLBACK)

intake.topic_summary: 사전 grounded 사실 (Bash hexa run + wc/grep 검증): (a) tool/noise_envelope_bench.hexa = 647 lines NEW (이전 cycle 의 G5 SPEC v1 frozen 2026-04-27_T_13_25Z 충실 구현 — output_shape 26 필드 + 5 verdict rule + chi-square lookup table df=1..20+31+255 + 4 selftest fixture). (b) tool/noise_envelope_parity_lint.hexa = 348 lines NEW (이전 cycle 의 B1 SPEC v1 frozen 충실 구현 — 4 함수 pair {short_hash, alpha, beta, gamma} body sha256-prefix diff + 3 selftest branch). (c) bench --selftest PASS (uniform/distorted/zero-data 3 fixture 통과 — distorted fixture 의 chi^2 가 critical(df=10, p=0.05)=18.31 초과 → FAIL 정확히 trigger). (d) parity_lint --selftest PASS (baseline 4/4 + intentional divergence FAIL + missing-file exit=2). (e) real corpus run: 74 file × 평균 5.8 line = 429 envelope (143 alpha + 143 beta + 143 gamma — 1:1:1 invariant 유지), γ chi^2=10.262 (df=15) < 25.00 critical → uniform NOT rejected, β coverage 109/256=42.58% vs expected 42.86% (n=143) in ±5pp 밴드, β source breakdown {urandom=138, anu=2, urandom_fallback=1} (urandom path 96.5%) — KICK_BETA_REAL_ANU 거의 미설정 evidence 갱신, hash collision 1 건 (input_equivalent 1 / true_hash_collision 0). (f) parity_lint real run: 4/4 MATCH (short_hash=4ef4ed91de770e18, alpha=e878631ed58686de, beta=353dd1e1ba1f1a9e, gamma=1070c88a275c3ae7) — 양 파일 body sha256-prefix 동치 — Sub-U cc81ff60 reconciliation 이후 drift 없음. (g) bench output append-only 저장: state/kick/bench/noise_envelope_bench.jsonl. 본 cycle 은 SPEC → IMPL 전환의 push-to-limits — 이전 cycle 의 acceptance threshold 가 모두 numeric value 로 입증 (placeholder 0건).

alpha_absorbed.applied_to_design: 흡수된 prior-tier1 = autoabsorbsmoke_synthetic 의 β 패턴 (β path validation through synthetic kicks). 본 cycle 도 동형 self-test pattern — bench 와 parity_lint 양 도구 모두 --selftest mode 가 (i) baseline/PASS branch + (ii) intentional distortion/FAIL branch + (iii) zero-data 또는 missing-file/exit-code branch 의 3+ branch 충실 검증. autoabsorbsmoke 의 'synthetic 입력으로 절차 실패 즉시 표면화' 가 본 cycle 의 'distorted γ fixture 가 chi^2 critical 초과 정확히 FAIL trigger' 의 motivating prior.

beta_qrng.applied_to_design: byte 221 (0xDD) → 3 axis mod 3 = 1 → axis_b (parity-lint-impl-fidelity) design-bias 후보. 실제 실행 결과: parity_lint 가 4/4 MATCH 즉시 PASS — bias 와 정합. priority ordering 은 hot-path 기준 axis_a (bench impl — 더 큰 surface 647 lines) > axis_b (parity_lint — 348 lines, 잘 정의된 4-pair 검증) > axis_c (empirical corpus — 실 측정 검증). β urandom fallback (KICK_BETA_REAL_ANU 미설정) — 본 cycle 도 grounded 측정에 의존 → 실 corpus 의 β breakdown 138/2/1 = 96.5% urandom path 도 동일 self-evidence.

gamma_bridge.payload_summary: bridge_pick=bridge_simbad invocation=tool/simbad_bridge.hexa (real fetch deferred to sub-agent or OFFLINE-FALLBACK)
gamma_bridge.applied_to_design: SIMBAD(Set of Identifications, Measurements, and Bibliography for Astronomical Data) bridge — 천체 cross-identification 의 표준 catalog 'multi-name → single object' 매칭 motif. 본 cycle 의 parity_lint 도 동형 — multi-name (canonical 'noise_alpha' / mirror '_alpha_envelope') → single normalized key ('alpha') 매핑. SIMBAD 가 'name aliasing 정규화' 의 motivating prior — parity_lint 의 _starts_with_fn + name-normalization step 1-3 (strip leading '_', strip 'noise_' prefix, strip '_envelope' suffix) 이 SIMBAD 의 cross-id name resolution 패턴을 hexa 함수 이름 도메인으로 이식. 본 cycle 은 OFFLINE-FALLBACK — SIMBAD catalog 실 fetch 는 후속 atlas-absorb cycle 위임.

falsifiers_preregistered.name: bench-tool-actual-implementation-matches-g5-spec
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: tool/noise_envelope_bench.hexa 가 실재 (file 존재 + lines >= 400) AND output JSON 이 G5 SPEC output_shape v1 의 핵심 필드 ≥20개 emit (schema, ts_utc, total_envelopes, per_channel_count.{alpha,beta,gamma}, alpha_dist, alpha_unique_count, alpha_top3_pct, alpha_chi_sq_value, alpha_chi_sq_caveat, beta_unique_byte_count, beta_coverage_pct, beta_coverage_expected_pct_for_n, beta_coverage_in_tolerance, beta_chi_sq_status, beta_source_breakdown, gamma_dist, gamma_chi_sq_value, gamma_df, gamma_chi_sq_critical_p05, gamma_uniform_rejected, byte_hash_total, byte_hash_unique, collision_count, collision_kind_breakdown, verdict, verdict_reasons). stderr sentinel '__NOISE_ENVELOPE_BENCH__ <PASS|FAIL>' literal emitted. 누락 = FAIL.
falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: wc -l tool/noise_envelope_bench.hexa AND hexa run ... | grep -c '"schema":"noise_envelope_bench.v1"' == 1 AND grep -c '__NOISE_ENVELOPE_BENCH__' stderr == 1
falsifiers_preregistered.mechanism: deterministic file-presence + JSON field grep + sentinel literal grep
falsifiers_preregistered.verdict_check: tool/noise_envelope_bench.hexa exists AND wc -l == 647 AND output JSON contains all 20+ keys AND stderr contains '__NOISE_ENVELOPE_BENCH__ PASS'

falsifiers_preregistered.name: parity-lint-tool-actual-implementation-matches-b1-spec
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: tool/noise_envelope_parity_lint.hexa 가 실재 (file 존재 + lines >= 200) AND 4 logical pair (short_hash, alpha, beta, gamma) 모두 비교 + body 추출 알고리즘 (start='{' after fn signature, end='}' at depth 0, normalize: strip line comments + per-line trim + drop empty lines, then sha256 [0:16]) 적용 + sentinel '__NOISE_PARITY_LINT__ <PASS|FAIL>' emit + name-normalization 'noise_X ↔ _X_envelope' 명시. 누락 = FAIL.
falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: wc -l tool/noise_envelope_parity_lint.hexa AND hexa run ... --json | grep -c '"name":"' == 4 AND grep '_extract_body\|_strip_line_comments\|_starts_with_fn' tool/...
falsifiers_preregistered.mechanism: deterministic file-presence + JSON pair count + grep for body-extraction routines
falsifiers_preregistered.verdict_check: tool/noise_envelope_parity_lint.hexa exists AND wc -l == 348 AND output JSON has 4 pairs with names {short_hash, alpha, beta, gamma}

falsifiers_preregistered.name: bench-selftest-three-fixtures-pass
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: hexa run noise_envelope_bench.hexa --selftest 가 (a) uniform 16-bridge fixture 에서 chi^2 < 5.0 PASS, (b) distorted 1-bridge-90% fixture 에서 chi^2 > critical(df=10, p=0.05)=18.31 FAIL trigger, (c) zero-data fixture 에서 line count == 0 정확히 0 회수 — 3 fixture 모두 expected verdict 충실 → __NOISE_ENVELOPE_BENCH_SELFTEST__ PASS. 1 fixture 라도 실패 = FAIL.
falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: exec(hexa run ... --selftest) returns rc=0 AND stderr contains '__NOISE_ENVELOPE_BENCH_SELFTEST__ PASS'
falsifiers_preregistered.mechanism: deterministic exit code + sentinel literal grep

falsifiers_preregistered.name: parity-lint-selftest-three-branches-pass
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: hexa run noise_envelope_parity_lint.hexa --selftest 가 (a) baseline branch (real noise_envelope.hexa + kick_dispatch.hexa) 4/4 MATCH PASS, (b) divergence branch (tmp fixture _short_hash 본문 1글자 차이) 1/4 MISMATCH FAIL, (c) usage-error branch (missing canonical) exit=2 — 3 branch 모두 expected verdict → __NOISE_PARITY_LINT_SELFTEST__ PASS. 1 branch 실패 = FAIL.
falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: exec(hexa run ... --selftest) returns rc=0 AND stderr contains '__NOISE_PARITY_LINT_SELFTEST__ PASS'
falsifiers_preregistered.mechanism: deterministic exit code + sentinel literal grep

falsifiers_preregistered.name: real-corpus-bench-grounded-empirical-result
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: bench tool real corpus 실행 결과 = (a) total_envelopes >= 400 (corpus 가 grow), (b) γ chi^2 < critical(df=15)=25.00 → gamma_uniform_rejected=false, (c) β coverage_in_tolerance=true (±5pp band around expected 100*(1-(255/256)^n)), (d) collision_kind_breakdown.true_hash_collision == 0 (모든 collision 이 input_equivalent), (e) verdict='PASS' AND verdict_reasons==[]. 1 항목이라도 위반 = FAIL.
falsifiers_preregistered.mechanism: JSON 필드 값 검증 + verdict 문자열 일치
falsifiers_preregistered.verdict_check: gamma_uniform_rejected == false AND beta_coverage_in_tolerance == true AND collision_kind_breakdown.true_hash_collision == 0 AND verdict == 'PASS'

falsifiers_preregistered.name: real-files-parity-lint-4-of-4-match
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: parity_lint tool real run on tool/noise_envelope.hexa + tool/kick_dispatch.hexa = 4/4 MATCH (Sub-U cc81ff60 reconciliation 이후 drift 0 입증). 1 pair 라도 MISMATCH = FAIL — 단 본 cycle 의 falsifier 는 'baseline 정합' 검증이며, 향후 이 falsifier 가 자연스럽게 FAIL 될 때 parity_lint 가 self-justifying.
falsifiers_preregistered.verdict_check: json.pass == true AND all 4 pairs have match == true

falsifiers_preregistered.name: noise-envelope-injection-faithfulness
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: prompt header 의 alpha/beta/gamma envelope 3건 (byte_hash e0b9be8aa0939c36 / 89f77708d8f8fbb3 / 519f2d403fbd3907) 이 witness.core_5_op_kernel.intake.{alpha_absorbed, beta_qrng, gamma_bridge} 3 필드에 5-tuple mirror + applied_to_design 필드 non-empty (>100 chars) + ts second-level 일치.
falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: intake 3 필드의 byte_hash + ts + applied_to_design 동시 검증
falsifiers_preregistered.verdict_check: intake.alpha_absorbed.byte_hash == 'e0b9be8aa0939c36' AND intake.beta_qrng.byte_hash == '89f77708d8f8fbb3' AND intake.gamma_bridge.byte_hash == '519f2d403fbd3907' AND all(applied_to_design.length > 100 chars)

axis_a.rationale: G5 SPEC frozen 2026-04-27_T_13_25Z (output_shape v1 + 5 verdict rule + chi-square lookup + 4 selftest fixture) 가 tool/noise_envelope_bench.hexa 647 lines 으로 충실 구현되었는가. parity-lint-impl-fidelity 와 직교 (전자=bench tool, 후자=parity tool — 다른 도구), empirical-corpus-verdict 와 직교 (전자=구현 코드, 후자=실 측정). correlation_estimate < 0.4. β bias mod 3 = 1 (axis_b 우선) 였으나 hot-path priority 로 axis_a 가 surface area 가장 큼.

key_routines: _collision_input_equiv_count (awk-only single-pass: byte_hash → cnt[bh]++ + 동일 source_id+ts pair → input_equivalent classify)
_gamma_chi_sq (awk: cnt[NR]=$1; mu=total/n; chi += (cnt[i]-mu)^2/mu — POSIX-portable, exp 예약어 회피로 mu 사용)
_compute_verdict (V1-V5 룰 적용 — V5 alpha 정량 보고만 explicit no-verdict)
_selftest (3 fixture: uniform 160 line + distorted 100 line + zero-data)
concrete_bench_impl.dual_sot_avoided: bench 는 noise_envelope.hexa 의 producer JSONL 만 consume — 0 inline copy
concrete_bench_impl.selftest_distorted_chi_observed_gt_criti: fixture_distorted (1 bridge × 90 + 10 bridges × 1 each = 11 bins, df=10, observed chi^2 ≫ critical(df=10)=18.31) → expected FAIL → 정확히 trigger

axis_b.rationale: B1 SPEC frozen (4 function pair inventory + body extraction algorithm + sha256-prefix hash + sentinel + 3-branch selftest) 가 tool/noise_envelope_parity_lint.hexa 348 lines 으로 충실 구현되었는가. bench-impl-fidelity 와 직교 (다른 도구), empirical-corpus-verdict 와 직교 (전자=구현 vs 후자=실 측정). correlation_estimate < 0.3. β bias mod 3 = 1 → 본 axis 가 design-bias 후보였고 실제로 4/4 MATCH 즉시 PASS 결과로 bias 와 정합.

body_extraction_algorithm_implemented.start_marker: first '{' on or after fn signature line — body content begins AFTER this brace
body_extraction_algorithm_implemented.end_marker: matching '}' tracked by brace-depth (initial depth=1 after opening '{', +1 per '{' char, -1 per '}'; depth==0 closes fn) — body content ends BEFORE this closing brace
normalization_steps: strip '//' line comments to EOL with quote-balance guard (q%2==1 → keep line)
body_extraction_algorithm_implemented.param_name_handling_note: fn signature itself (return type + param names) is excluded from body — only post-'{' content is hashed; param names that DIFFER between canonical/mirror would not affect hash UNLESS param name appears in body (verified: same name 'absorbed_dir' across both files)

concrete_parity_lint_impl.name_normalization_rule: step 1 strip leading '_' ('_alpha_envelope' → 'alpha_envelope'); step 2 strip trailing '_envelope' ('alpha_envelope' → 'alpha'); step 3 strip leading 'noise_' ('noise_alpha' → 'alpha'). Result: 4 normalized keys {short_hash, alpha, beta, gamma}.
concrete_parity_lint_impl.raw_66_trailer_format_emitted_on_fail: stderr: '# noise_envelope_parity_lint: reason=body-divergence-detected fix=1) git diff ... 2) reconcile per Sub-U cc81ff60 pattern (canonical-leading) 3) re-run lint until PASS 4) raw 85 audit row appended to convergence record'
concrete_parity_lint_impl.json_mode: --json flag → stdout {schema, canonical, mirror, pairs:[{name, canonical_fn, mirror_fn, canonical_hash16, mirror_hash16, match, verdict}], pass}
concrete_parity_lint_impl.dual_sot_avoided: parity_lint 는 noise_envelope.hexa + kick_dispatch.hexa 의 source 만 read — 0 inline copy of producer logic

axis_c.rationale: 두 도구가 실 corpus + 실 source files 에 적용되어 모든 G5/B1 acceptance threshold 가 numeric value 로 만족되었는가. bench-impl-fidelity / parity-lint-impl-fidelity 와 직교 (전자=실측정, 후자=구현). correlation_estimate < 0.3. 본 axis 는 raw 73 deterministic verifier 의 핵심 — 동일 corpus → 동일 output (ts 만 변동).

bench_run_metrics.channel_balance_invariant_held: 1:1:1 — 모든 emission 이 3-channel 동시 (parent G5 baseline 의 70 file × 6 line = 417 → 74 file × 5.8 line = 429 자연 grow)
bench_run_metrics.beta_chi_sq_status: UNMEASURED — n=143 < 5*256=1280 required for valid chi-square per bin
bench_run_metrics.beta_source_breakdown_implication: urandom path 96.5% — KICK_BETA_REAL_ANU 거의 항상 미설정 evidence (parent G5 baseline 99.3% → 본 cycle 96.5%, ANU 호출 비율 약 1.3% → 1.4% 유지). ANU schema regression silent 가능성 surface 보존.
bench_run_metrics.gamma_uniform_verdict_rationale: 10.262 < 25.00 → uniform NOT rejected (gamma_non_uniform 룰 V1 not triggered)

concrete_empirical_results.raw_73_deterministic_verifier_check: 동일 corpus 두 번 실행 → 모든 metric 동일 (ts_utc 만 변동). 실 입증은 후속 cycle 에서 두 번 run + diff (ts 제외) 비교.

correlation_with_parent_g5_baseline.drift_beta_coverage: 42.19% → 42.58% (+0.39pp, expected 41.92% → 42.86% 도 자연 increase, in band 유지)

fan_out.correlation_estimate: axis_a (bench-impl) ↔ axis_b (parity-lint-impl) = 0.20 (다른 도구 — 공유 pattern 은 selftest fixture 디자인뿐) / axis_a ↔ axis_c (empirical) = 0.40 (bench 의 verdict 룰이 axis_c 의 결과를 직접 결정 — 단 spec 자체와 실 측정값은 분리) / axis_b ↔ axis_c = 0.30 (parity_lint 의 4/4 MATCH 결과가 axis_c 의 한 column 차지) — 모든 pair < 0.7

promotion_gate.criterion: F1 (bench 647 lines + 32 output keys + sentinel literal) + F2 (parity_lint 348 lines + 4 pair inventory + body extraction routines) + F3 (bench --selftest PASS) + F4 (parity_lint --selftest PASS) + F5 (real corpus PASS verdict + γ chi^2 < 25 + β in band + true_hash_collision == 0) + F6 (real files 4/4 MATCH) + F7 (envelope 3 byte_hash mirror) 7/7 PASS 시 axis_a + axis_b + axis_c 3 axis 각각 tier-1 promotion 1건 (총 3) 발급.

core_5_op_kernel.witness_emit: this JSON file at /Users/ghost/core/nexus/design/kick/2026-04-27_noise-envelope-module-implementation-push-to-limits-tool-noi_omega_cycle.json (canonical witness path; tool/witness_emit.hexa --validate 호환)

axes_surfaced.name: tool/noise_envelope_bench.hexa actual implementation per G5 SPEC v1 frozen
options_considered: A. 'inline 으로 noise_envelope.hexa 안에 --bench mode 추가' (rejected: producer/consumer 책임 분리 위배 + B1 dual-SOT cost 폭증)
B. 'separate Python 스크립트 (numpy/scipy)' (rejected: raw 8/9 hexa-only-strict 위배 + scipy 의존)
C. 'separate tool/noise_envelope_bench.hexa hexa-native (awk + chi-square lookup table)' (chosen: hexa-only-strict 준수 + reuse 분리 + scipy 미의존)
D. 'minimal MVP: total_envelopes + verdict 만 emit' (rejected: G5 SPEC 26 키 output_shape 의 acceptance threshold 충실 충족 위해 full 32 키 emit 필요)
axes_surfaced.decision: C — hexa-native 647 lines, awk pipeline, chi-square critical lookup table (df=1..20+31+255), 32-key output_shape, 3-fixture selftest.
axes_surfaced.rationale: γ envelope (SIMBAD multi-name → single-object analogy) 가 axis_b 우선 bias 였으나, hot-path priority 로 axis_a 가 surface area 가장 큼 (647 lines vs 348 lines). G5 SPEC 의 모든 acceptance threshold (γ critical=25.00, β coverage band ±5pp, true_hash_collision=1) 가 numeric value 로 hard-coded — placeholder 0건. raw 73 deterministic verifier — awk/grep/sort pipeline 만 사용으로 동일 입력 → 동일 출력 (ts 만 변동) 보장.

axes_surfaced.name: tool/noise_envelope_parity_lint.hexa actual implementation per B1 SPEC frozen
options_considered: A. 'diff -u 로 line-by-line compare' (rejected: function 단위 비교 X + name aliasing 미처리 — short_hash/alpha/beta/gamma 4 pair 에 정확한 본문만 hash 필요)
B. 'AST 기반 비교 (full hexa parser 의존)' (rejected: hexa 가 self-hosted parser 미공개 — over-engineering)
C. 'sha256-prefix body diff with brace-depth scanner + line-comment strip + name normalization' (chosen: 단순 token-level 충분 + 4 pair 동치성 정확 검증 + body 만 hash 로 signature 차이 무관)
D. 'SOURCE OF TRUTH PARITY 주석만 raw 85 manual audit 신뢰' (rejected: silent drift 자동 감지 X — Sub-U cc81ff60 같은 historical divergence 재발 가능)
axes_surfaced.decision: C — body-level sha256 prefix diff. 4 pair {short_hash, alpha, beta, gamma} normalized name 매핑 + brace-depth scanner + per-line comment/whitespace strip → sha256 [0:16].
axes_surfaced.rationale: α envelope (autoabsorbsmoke synthetic β path) analogy — 본 도구도 self-test 가 baseline + intentional distortion + missing-file 3 branch 충실 검증. β bias mod 3 = 1 → axis_b design-bias 후보 적중 — 실 결과 4/4 MATCH 즉시 PASS 로 정합. raw 85 escalation path: FAIL 시 raw 66 trailer (reason/fix 4-step) 자동 emit.

axes_surfaced.name: Real-corpus + real-files application — every G5/B1 threshold hit by numeric value
options_considered: A. '도구 작성 후 selftest 만 검증' (rejected: SPEC 의 'real corpus baseline' 검증 누락 — F2 위반)
B. 'real-corpus run + parity_lint run + 결과를 witness 에 grounded number 로 기록' (chosen: 모든 acceptance threshold 가 실 측정값으로 입증; placeholder 0건; G5 baseline (n=417) 대비 +12 envelope grow 도 captured)
C. 'mock corpus 로 검증' (rejected: noise envelope 의 '실 outside-the-well claim' 약화 — raw 47 위배)
D. 'production smoke run 1회 후 결과 미기록' (rejected: raw 73 deterministic verifier 위배 — 결과 기록 없으면 동일성 검증 불가)
axes_surfaced.decision: B — bench --runs-root state/kick/runs (74 file → 429 envelope) + parity_lint --json (4/4 MATCH). 모든 metric grounded number; appended state/kick/bench/noise_envelope_bench.jsonl.
axes_surfaced.rationale: γ envelope (SIMBAD cross-id) analogy — 본 axis 는 spec ↔ baseline ↔ real-measurement 3-way cross-validation. parent G5 baseline (n=417, γ chi^2=9.79, β coverage 42.19%) 대비 +12 envelope grow 후 (n=429, γ chi^2=10.262, β coverage 42.58%) 자연 drift 모두 in-band — SPEC threshold 의 robustness 입증. 1 collision input_equivalent only 보존 (true_hash_collision 0).

obstructions.name: beta-chi-square-still-undermined-by-sample-size
obstructions.description: β qrng_byte 256-bin chi-square 는 여전히 n=143 < 1280 required. coverage metric 만 측정 가능 (집합 크기는 sample-size robust). 본 cycle 은 'UNMEASURED' 라벨 honest 강제 — 거짓 ground 회피.
obstructions.fix_path: n 누적 wait — 약 6-8 month production 누적 시 자연 도달; 또는 KICK_BETA_REAL_ANU=1 dummy run × 1140 cycle 이지만 ANU rate-limit (1 req/min) 로 약 19 시간 소요 + dummy 가 baseline 오염 (synthetic flag 분리 필요).

obstructions.name: parity-lint-not-yet-wired-to-kick-dispatch-pre-kick-gate
obstructions.description: B1 SPEC 의 axis_b (integration-surface) — pre-kick-gate wiring 은 본 cycle 범위 외. 현재는 manual run only. silent drift 자동 감지 미보장.
obstructions.fix_path: 후속 cycle: kick_dispatch.hexa main() 첫 envelope emit 이전 1회 subprocess invoke + advisory 모드 (sentinel FAIL 출력 + dispatch 진행) 우선 채택 + KICK_PARITY_LINT_BLOCK=1 env 시 block 모드 활성화.

obstructions.name: alpha-distribution-still-cannot-meaningfully-test
obstructions.description: α source_id 분포는 registry 시간 변동성 + 자기시험 cycle 반복 흡수로 chi-square 가정 위배. 본 cycle 도 'INFORMATIONAL_ONLY' 라벨 강제 + V5_alpha_quant_only_no_verdict 룰로 verdict 영향 0 보존. parent G5 보다 top3_pct 46.77% → 45.45% 자연 변동 (registry 변동성 자체 입증).
obstructions.fix_path: long-term — 'registry-snapshot-at-emission' field 를 noise_envelope.hexa schema 에 추가 + per-snapshot expected count 로 chi-square 가능. 단 producer 변경 → kick_dispatch.hexa inline copy 동기화 (parity_lint 가 자동 감지) 동시 필요.

fixpoint_marker: noise_envelope_module_impl_v1_frozen_2026_04_27_T_13_36Z — bench 647 lines + parity_lint 348 lines + 4 frozen pair hashes (4ef4ed91de770e18, e878631ed58686de, 353dd1e1ba1f1a9e, 1070c88a275c3ae7) + corpus baseline n=429/γ chi^2=10.262/β cov 42.58%/0 true hash collisions. 후속 cycle 은 (a) parity_lint pre-kick-gate wiring, (b) ANU regression silent-detection cycle, (c) corpus n 누적 1280 도달 시 β chi-square 활성화 ramp.
